title: Add non-record 16MB submission: MOEA outer-loop proxy F2 on 1xRTX 3090
author: ai-wes

data.description: Input and output embeddings are tied to reduce parameters and artifact size.
Uses grouped-query attention with fewer KV heads than attention heads.
Offline multi-objective evolutionary search (MOEA) outer loop used to search architecture, training, and systems choices before distilling the final runnable artifact.

novel_contributions: First artifact handoff from an offline MOEA outer-loop search workflow into a runnable parameter-golf submission folder
Single-GPU proxy run on 1x RTX 3090 to validate the search-to-artifact workflow
Reduced validation window proxy evaluation for a non-record reference point
Post-training int8 + zlib export of the model artifact
Tied-embedding small GQA transformer configuration distilled from offline search
